headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://vercel.live https://*.walletconnect.com https://*.coinbase.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.trustmebro.market https://*.base.org wss://*.base.org https://sepolia.base.org https://mainnet.base.org https://hermes.pyth.network https://*.walletconnect.com wss://*.walletconnect.com https://*.coinbase.com https://api.developer.coinbase.com https://*.infura.io https://*.alchemy.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
